hero.name: Maxmud Orifov
hero.title: Crafting calm, modern web experiences.
hero.description: I build thoughtful interfaces with React, TypeScript, and design systems that feel effortless and premium.

about.title: About me
about.description: I am a junior frontend developer focused on writing clean, maintainable code and creating polished interfaces with strong attention to detail.
about.educationText: I am currently studying frontend development at Mars IT School, where I strengthen my skills in UI architecture, modern JavaScript, and product-minded development.
about.focusText: I enjoy building accessible, fast, and elegant experiences with React, TypeScript, and design systems.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: A compact toolkit for creating thoughtful, modern interfaces.

education.description: A steady path of practice, refinement, and hands-on building.
